title: Open Assistant
subtitle: AI-powered code and document completion

usage.title: Usage
usage.step1: Select the Agent you want to use on the home page. Click ✏️ on a prompt capsule to set a shortcut, then toggle the switch on the right to enable it.
usage.step2: Click ⚙️ in the top-right corner to access Settings: manage prompts, configure general options.
usage.step3: Press an enabled shortcut in any application to trigger AI analysis. The result will be automatically inserted at your cursor.
usage.note: Shortcuts work even when this window is closed. When multiple prompts share the same shortcut, only the first one registered takes effect.

prompt.title: Prompt Management
prompt.contentHelp: This prompt will be sent as the full instruction to the AI. Write a clear and complete prompt.
prompt.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete prompt "{name}"?
prompt.resetConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to reset to the built-in default prompt?

agent.title: AI Agent
agent.info: Configure each agent and set shortcuts for each prompt. Press a shortcut to trigger that agent with the chosen prompt.

config.title: ⚙️ Configuration
config.outputHelp: Auto insert: automatically pastes to your cursor. Generate to clipboard: copies to clipboard, press Ctrl+V to paste manually.
config.captureSSE: SSE Fetch (recommended, works when minimized to tray)
config.captureDOM: DOM Poll (Doubao window must stay open)
config.captureHelp: SSE Fetch intercepts the AI HTTP streaming response via CDP, no window visibility required. DOM Poll retrieves responses by polling the page DOM and requires the Doubao window to stay open.
config.outputModeHelp: Streaming pastes the AI response incrementally as it generates. Full waits for the complete response before pasting.
config.resetConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults?

about.title: About
about.description: AI-powered code and document completion assistant

result.title: Last Result
result.placeholder: No results yet. Trigger the assistant to see results here.

log.title: 📝 Activity Log
log.promptDefaultReset: Default prompt reset to built-in value

shortcut.title: Set Shortcut
shortcut.conflict: ⚠ This shortcut may be used by another application

defaultPrompt:
I have sent a screenshot. Please analyze the content and provide smart completion suggestions.

Current app: {app}

Requirements:

1. Determine what I am doing (writing code / writing documents / other)
2. If it's code, identify the programming language and context
3. Based on the context, provide smart completion suggestions
4. Only return the completion content, do not explain
5. Maintain code formatting and indentation
6. Use the correct indentation (spaces/tabs) based on the programming language and tools
7. Do not repeat existing content the user has already written, such as user's comments

Please directly analyze the screenshot and return completion suggestions:
